# INTENT

## User Request

Change the project editor so upload and delete actions for images stay in frontend memory and are only applied when the user clicks Save.

## Requested Outcome

The project editor should feel smoother by staging asset changes locally until final save.

## Constraints

- Keep the scope focused on image asset staging in the project editor.
- Preserve the existing save-driven project flow.
- Verification is required.

## Open Questions

- None for this slice.
